title: LeoTweaks Button Outlines
description: Gives All Pressure Plates and Buttons visible outlines. Compatible with other resource packs! No Mods required.
body:
**Buttons and Pressure Plates have an outline corresponding to their blocks, hence making them more visible.**

---
Useful for those that want to be able to see Button and Pressure Plates when they're normally a bit hidden. Also looks very clean!

![Shows all of the Buttons and Pressure Plates next to each other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90cf44e76cdebcc67a0d8549922683ccd6f1e5f9.png)

**This pack is compatible with Resource packs that change block textures!**
_This pack uses json models to give border textures to the buttons and pressure plates, instead of changing the texture of them; the models adapt to your selected resource packs!_
